allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
style: apply BYU-Idaho branding and update documentation

Redesign UI to follow BYU-Idaho branding standards: Brand Blue header,
institutional color palette, Source Sans 3 / Source Serif 4 web fonts,
light theme with branded card surfaces. Update PWA manifest theme color
and add Google Fonts caching for offline support. Refresh all docs to
reflect current project state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
